name: ccrotate
description: Skills for inspecting and operating ccrotate through local or ccrotate-serve cloud mode.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Claude and Codex account-pool status via ccrotate or ccrotate-serve.
interface.longDescription: Provides ccrotate skills that use ccrotate-serve in cloud/devbox mode and avoid mutating stale local account state. Local mode still supports direct ccrotate CLI operations.
